tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Medianoche en la calle, fuego en mi sangre
Tu me miras de lejos, yo se lo que quieres
Las luces del barrio pintan sombras en tu cara
Ven aca mami, la noche es nuestra

[Pre-Chorus]
Dale dale, no pares
Que esta noche nadie se va
Dale dale, sin miedo
El fuego no se apaga

[Chorus]
Fuego latino, burning in my soul
Perreo all night, losing all control
Fuego latino, feel it in your bones
We don't stop until the morning comes
Fuego, fuego, fuego

[Verse 2]
808 retumba contra la pared
Tu cintura se mueve, yo pierdo la fe
No necesito nada mas que este momento
Tu y yo, la calle, y este sentimiento

[Pre-Chorus]
Dale dale, no pares
Que esta noche nadie se va
Dale dale, sin miedo
El fuego no se apaga

[Chorus]
Fuego latino, burning in my soul
Perreo all night, losing all control
Fuego latino, feel it in your bones
We don't stop until the morning comes
Fuego, fuego, fuego

[Bridge]
La calle es nuestra tonight
No hay manana, solo esta night
Siente el ritmo, siente el fire
Higher, higher, higher

[Outro]
Fuego latino, fuego latino
Fuego, fuego, fuego

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Soft static on the television screen
Your shadow still haunting somewhere in between
The ceiling spins like constellations made of you
Everything is fading into something blue

[Pre-Chorus]
I reach for you but you dissolve
Like morning mist, like problems unsolved
Am I awake or am I dreaming still

[Chorus]
Fading light, fading light
You were the sun and now it's night
Fading light, hold on tight
Everything beautiful puts up a fight
Before it fades, before it fades
Into the fading light

[Verse 2]
Your laughter echoes down the hallway walls
Polaroids of us before the curtain falls
I wear your sweater like a second skin
Trying to remember how to breathe again

[Pre-Chorus]
I reach for you but you dissolve
Like morning mist, like problems unsolved
Am I awake or am I dreaming still

[Chorus]
Fading light, fading light
You were the sun and now it's night
Fading light, hold on tight
Everything beautiful puts up a fight
Before it fades, before it fades
Into the fading light

[Bridge]
Some things aren't meant to stay
They're meant to light the way
And leave you standing in the glow
Of everything you'll never know

[Outro]
Fading, fading, fading light
Fading, fading, fading light

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Rain taps the window like an old friend knocking
Coffee getting cold beside the book I'm reading
Nowhere to be, nothing to prove
Just these quiet hours and this gentle groove

[Chorus]
Sunday pages turning slow
Afternoon light with its amber glow
Let the world rush by outside
In here I've got nothing left to hide
Sunday pages, Sunday pages

[Verse 2]
Dog-eared chapters, pencil in the margin
Writing little thoughts that nobody will read
The clock forgets to move on days like these
And I am finally, finally at ease

[Chorus]
Sunday pages turning slow
Afternoon light with its amber glow
Let the world rush by outside
In here I've got nothing left to hide
Sunday pages, Sunday pages

[Bridge]
Maybe peace is not a place
It's this worn-out chair
This blanket, this space
This moment suspended in the air

[Outro]
Sunday pages, Sunday pages
Turning slow, turning slow
